raw.chosen: Mirrored browser primitive workflow-step pattern for GitHub
raw.reasoning: The SDK already routes integration steps through RunnerStepExecutor; serializing params/config/output preserves workflow template interpolation and keeps GitHub primitive behavior local to the primitive package.

retrospective.summary: Added GitHub workflow-step integration, package exports, and workflow example
